## Purpose

What contract-writing, input, generator, or documentation problem does this PR solve?

## Change Type

- [ ] Contract/document generator
- [ ] Input schema or sample
- [ ] Template or clause wording
- [ ] UI
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Audit/CI/repo guardrail

## Public Boundary

- [ ] No real customer, company, project, person, contact, payment, or access details are included.
- [ ] No generated `output/` files are included.
- [ ] No local/private input files are included.
- [ ] Public samples are fictional and reusable.
- [ ] External practical references are generalized into product rules, not copied or cited as clause sources.

## Contract Safety

- [ ] This does not present itself as legal advice.
- [ ] Draft wording stays reviewable as a contract/documentation aid.
- [ ] Buyer and supplier effects are considered.
- [ ] New clause wording explains which dispute it reduces.
- [ ] Risky wording that needs expert review is marked in docs or PR notes.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run audit:publish`
- [ ] Generated DOCX files were inspected when document wording changed.

## Notes For Reviewers

What should reviewers focus on?
